title: ByeBye Phantoms 👋
description: ByeBye Phantoms adds powerful new tools and wings to finally put an end to those pesky night stalkers!
body:
![get started](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dde59cde465d9193888264b72187793579e6fe92.png)
**🌙 ByeBye Phantoms**
Tired of being swarmed at night by annoying phantoms? This mod introduces three powerful new items to make the skies peaceful again! 

**🪓 New Items**
Phantom Killer 50 Distance – Instantly eliminates all phantoms within a 50 block radius.

Phantom Killer Infinity – A stronger version that wipes out phantoms from the entire world with one use.

No more sleepless nights needed to keep phantoms away.

Items balanced for both survival and creative play.

Perfect for players who enjoy exploring or building without constant phantom attacks

Phantom Wings – kills phantoms when the phantom wings are in a player invertory. ( 50 blocks distance )

**✨ Features**
 
🔧 Compatibility
Fully works in both singleplayer and multiplayer.

Lightweight and simple — just drop it into your mods folder and enjoy!

![50 distance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d55b1dfb96421e75e247811b74cf71dc41539034.png)
![50 distance | placement](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7efe42c09692102402d28c4e8a59d56b4e5a502a.png)
![distance infinity](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffcb28409af6ec6ae51b277fd335807fbee6bff2.png)

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ
#AD
